title: Create tasks from MyWork
excerpt: Given I keep mywork view open pretty much all day, it would be much more convenient and efficient if items / tasks could be created from the mywork view. During creation they could be assigned to a board.

posts.author: JessicaWM (Jessica Wilcock)
posts.cookedHtml: Given I keep mywork view open pretty much all day, it would be much more convenient and efficient if items / tasks could be created from the mywork view. During creation they could be assigned to a board.
